article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry names and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with notable figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is characterized by the fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, resulting in a distinctive sound that has garnered attention within electronic music circles.
In collaboration with Barnation, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack,' which contains a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across various productions.
This sample pack offers insight into his production techniques and has become a valuable resource for fellow producers seeking to incorporate his signature sounds.

Noizekid's work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, who share a common ground in electronic and dance music production.
